title: MedlinePlus: MedlinePlus Connect: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)
text:

The National Library of Medicine does not make or interpret CMS quality program or ONC certification regulations. To learn more about the CMS EHR Incentive Programs please visit www.cms.gov/ehrincentiveprograms . To learn more about the CMS Quality Payment Program please visit www.qpp.cms.gov . For health IT certification questions please visit the Office of the National Coordinator for Health Information Technology (ONC) or contact ONC.Certification@hhs.gov .
Who maintains MedlinePlus Connect? 
The National Library of Medicine, part of the National Institutes of Health, maintains MedlinePlus and MedlinePlus Connect. 
Who do I contact if I have questions? 
Submit questions to the MedlinePlus team. 
Sign up for the MedlinePlus Connect email list . 
Using MedlinePlus Connect 
Using MedlinePlus Connect 
How does MedlinePlus Connect work? 
MedlinePlus Connect responds to requests based on diagnosis (problem) codes, medication codes, laboratory test codes, and medical procedure codes. When an EHR or patient portal submits a code request, MedlinePlus Connect returns a response that includes links to relevant MedlinePlus health information. MedlinePlus Connect can reply with English or Spanish information. The "How MedlinePlus Connect Works" page has more information.
